MINI MINUTES: 9:03am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Stacey Alison Parlin, not present. Respondent, Gui Ping Lu, appears in Pro Per. Party, previously sworn, and respond to questions from Judge Myles. The Appeal had been filed untimely so the previous judgement awarded stands. The exhibits are returned to the Respondent in court.
